channel.title: GitHub Copilot Bulletin — English / Biweekly / Admins
channel.description: Latest GitHub Copilot updates for Admins (Biweekly, English)

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Biweekly #1 — March 2 to March 16, 2026 · Admins Edition
item.description: These two weeks sent a clear signal: agentic AI is scaling fast, and governance tooling is keeping pace. GitHub expanded enterprise controls for monitoring agent sessions, introduced new repository settings for coding agent workflow approvals, and required admins to explicitly enable GPT-5.4 via policy. Powerful capabilities stay under admin governance by design.
